screens.title: Ultra-Sleek Glassmorphic Dashboard
screens.prompt:
Title: Electric Blue & Indigo Glassmorphic Dashboard
Context: Color scheme swap from pink to a vibrant deep purple, electric blue, and teal palette while maintaining the sleek glassmorphic EdTech dashboard layout.
Edit request: Redesign the UI of the EDU PRO dashboard with a total color-scheme swap. Replace all pink elements with electric blue and teal accents. All buttons (Resume, View Details) should now be electric blue. Progress rings and the 'Weekly Activity' chart should use a teal-to-blue gradient. The background blurs should be transformed into deep indigo and teal glows. The typography and layout remain identical to the original, preserving the premium glassmorphic feel but with a cooler, high-contrast color palette. Variant 2 of 2.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.name: projects/1492597545947992561/screens/269f4b9ad1b4421da0fa9defaba3eeec

screens.title: Ultra-Sleek Glassmorphic Dashboard
screens.prompt:
Title: Refined Premium EdTech Dashboard
Context: Refining the glassmorphism dashboard to blend more seamlessly with the reference website's structured, premium layout for an EdTech context.
Edit request: Redesign the dashboard to blend the previous glassmorphism aesthetic with the structure of the reference website. The layout should be cleaner and more organized for an EdTech app. Use a multi-column grid: a slim left sidebar for navigation, a main central area with a large 'Welcome back' hero section, and a right sidebar for smaller widgets like 'Weekly Activity'. The background should be a softer, more subtle pastel gradient. UI elements like course cards and assignment lists should have frosted-glass effects but with more defined borders and clear, high-end typography to ensure readability. Incorporate circular progress rings and cleaner line charts from the reference. The overall feel should be super premium, professional, and balanced between futuristic and functional.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.name: projects/1492597545947992561/screens/c41dfdf62ba541c69dfcc38c83d8c72d

screens.title: Ultra-Sleek Glassmorphic Dashboard
screens.prompt:
Title: Refined Sleek White & Pink EdTech Dashboard
Context: Modern edtech dashboard with a refined color palette of sleek white and pink, blending glassmorphism with solid elements for a premium feel.
Edit request: Redesign the dashboard using a more sophisticated and controlled color palette: primarily sleek white, soft grays, and accents of a premium 'EdTech pink'. Replace the multi-colored background with a much more subtle, light-colored gradient or a clean off-white background with very soft pink glowing orbs. The UI elements should now mix glassmorphism with solid white cards for a more grounded 'app' feel, similar to the reference. Use solid white backgrounds for the main sidebar and key content areas to improve readability, while keeping glassmorphic effects for highlights or secondary widgets like 'Weekly Activity'. The typography should be sharp and professional. The circular progress rings and graphs should use the pink accent color. Ensure the overall aesthetic is clean, professional, and high-end.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.name: projects/1492597545947992561/screens/0ee55ea06a124db188be6d3198b5cbe8

screens.title: Ultra-Sleek Glassmorphic Dashboard
screens.prompt:
Title: Purple & Teal Glassmorphic Dashboard
Context: Color scheme swap from pink to a vibrant deep purple, electric blue, and teal palette while maintaining the sleek glassmorphic EdTech dashboard layout.
Edit request: Redesign the UI of the EDU PRO dashboard with a total color-scheme swap. Replace all magenta and pink accents with a vibrant palette of deep purples, electric blues, and teal. Keep the exact layout and text from the original design ('Welcome back, Anya', course names, etc.). Change all progress rings, buttons, and graph lines from pink to gradients of purple and cyan. Replace the pink background blurs with soft, diffused glows of royal purple and deep indigo. Maintain the high-end glassmorphic effect, frosted panels, and dark charcoal typography. Variant 1 of 2.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.name: projects/1492597545947992561/screens/5523d860cea04a46853570dcf96e8620

screens.title: Ultra-Sleek Glassmorphic Dashboard
screens.prompt:
Title: Ultra-Sleek Glassmorphic Dashboard
Context: Super premium and sleek modern edtech platform with a glassmorphism aesthetic.
Description of the screen: A super premium, ultra-modern EdTech landing page with a clean, high-end aesthetic. The design features a heavy glassmorphism style with frosted-glass containers floating over a soft, multi-colored pastel gradient background (soft purples, teals, and corals). The interface includes a high-tech dashboard layout with a minimalist side navigation, a 'Welcome back' header using elegant sans-serif typography, and interactive cards for 'Current Courses' and 'Assignments'. Use thin lines, subtle glows, and vibrant accent colors for progress bars and CTA buttons. Variant 1 of 2.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.name: projects/1492597545947992561/screens/c3f129ad1ae140e390d9d784b803f017

screens.title: Ultra-Sleek Glassmorphic Dashboard
screens.prompt:
Title: EDU PRO Performance Analytics View
Context: Ultra-sleek EdTech dashboard blending glassmorphism with structured professional elements.
Description of the screen: A detailed student performance and analytics view for 'EDU PRO'. This screen follows the 'sleek white and pink' aesthetic. It features a large, detailed 'Performance by Subject' donut chart with a glowing pink center. Below, a table-like list of 'Current Courses' (Advanced Machine Learning, Data Science Fundamentals) is shown with vibrant pink gradient progress bars and 'Resume' buttons. The right side contains a 'Weekly Activity' widget with a smooth wave graph and an 'Upcoming Assignments' list with circular checkboxes. The layout is spacious, using solid white card containers on a soft, minimalist background with pink ambient lighting. The typography is professional and modern, ensuring high legibility for educational data.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.name: projects/1492597545947992561/screens/5dc2ea9deb6b472d845c69a74578adb7

screens.title: Premium EdTech Landing Dashboard
screens.prompt:
Title: EDU PRO Course Catalog
Context: Premium glassmorphism EdTech platform for 'EDU PRO'.
Description of the screen: A premium course catalog page for 'EDU PRO' in the same ultra-sleek glassmorphism style as the dashboard. The layout features a left sidebar with filter categories (Science, Math, Arts) and a search bar at the top with a frosted-glass finish. The main content area displays a grid of course cards with high-quality imagery, glass-textured overlays, and pink 'Join' buttons. Each card shows progress bars for courses already started. The background is a soft, airy pastel gradient with subtle pink and purple glows. Typography is clean and professional.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.name: projects/1492597545947992561/screens/4d41a21f9bcc4e0580cae1b7fc56a01d

screens.title: Premium Course Library Interface
screens.prompt:
Title: Premium Course Library Interface
Context: Modern edtech dashboard for a super premium user experience.
Description of the screen: A super premium, sleek, and modern course management screen for an edtech platform. This design focuses on a rich 'Courses' library with high-quality card layouts, progress trackers, and a 'Top Recommended' section with live status indicators. It should maintain the glassmorphism aesthetic from the reference image, using translucent panels over a dreamy gradient background. Include a sophisticated header with search and user profile integration. Variant 3 of 3.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.name: projects/1492597545947992561/screens/fa796f956aa64313aeaee3eefb230f55

screens.title: Premium Aesthetic Learning Path
screens.prompt:
Title: Premium Aesthetic Learning Path
Context: Super premium and sleek modern edtech platform with a glassmorphism aesthetic.
Description of the screen: A sophisticated, premium EdTech interface focusing on immersive learning. This variant uses a more spacious, 'open' layout with large, high-quality imagery inside glass-textured cards. It features a sleek activity feed on the right, a centralized 'Learning Path' visualization with glowing nodes, and an ultra-modern navigation bar that disappears on scroll. The typography is bold and modern, with a focus on white space to create a 'super clean' and airy feel. The background is a very subtle, animated aurora-style gradient. Variant 2 of 2.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.name: projects/1492597545947992561/screens/3648629f5c7a47ea81f884779c96b4e2

screens.title: Ultra-Sleek Glassmorphic Dashboard
screens.prompt:
Title: Premium EDU PRO Dashboard Refinement
Context: Ultra-sleek EdTech dashboard blending glassmorphism with structured professional elements.
Description of the screen: A premium, ultra-sleek EdTech dashboard for 'EDU PRO'. The layout is organized with a clean white left sidebar (like Apex EdTech) and a main dashboard area featuring the refined white and pink theme from previous iterations. The top section greets 'Welcome back, Anya' with a large, elegant heading. Below it, a row of sleek statistic cards displays '1,250 Instructors', '11,250 Active Students', and a 'B+ Average Grade' with pink glowing accents. The central area shows a large, dynamic multi-line graph for 'Activity Overview' and circular progress rings for courses like 'Advanced Machine Learning'. The design uses a mix of solid white cards and subtle frosted-glass overlays. The background is a clean off-white with very soft, out-of-focus pink orbs. Navigation and data visualizations are crisp, using thin lines and high-end typography for a super-premium feel.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.name: projects/1492597545947992561/screens/350946879c734ecd8c30606a28fab09f

screens.title: Premium EdTech Landing Dashboard
screens.prompt:
Title: Ultra-Premium Glassmorphic EdTech Hub
Context: Redesigning the EDU PRO dashboard to perfectly blend the structured layout of the reference with an ultra-premium glassmorphism aesthetic.
Edit request: Redesign the dashboard to achieve a 'perfect fit' glassmorphism aesthetic based on the reference. Use a light, airy background with soft, out-of-focus pastel glows (purples and pinks). The main interface should consist of several distinct glass cards with soft-frosted textures and subtle white borders. The layout must follow the reference: a left sidebar for 'Courses' and 'Upcoming Assignments', a top navigation bar with pill-shaped active states, and a main content area. The main area includes a 'Welcome back' hero section, large stat cards (Instructors, Students, Grade), a wide 'Activity Overview' line chart, and a 'Performance by Subject' donut chart. Use the 'sleek white and pink' color scheme for all interactive elements like progress bars, buttons, and chart lines. The typography should be clean and professional, ensuring the UI feels like a super-modern, premium edtech app.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.name: projects/1492597545947992561/screens/9cc1beda96c0479d9df49de5184c638a
